subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Give thanks unto God that thou art firm in the Covenant and Testament and steadfast in the Cause of the Most Glorious Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان خدا را شکر کن که در عهد و میثاق مستقیمی و در امر جمال ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @secret societies, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @firmness in the Covenant, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers
